style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial architecture diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, drawn as a node graph. Labelled rounded nodes joined by curved labelled edges: « NUAGE », « PARE-FEU », « FRONTAL », « SERVEUR », « API TIERCE », « BASE DE DONNÉES » and « INTÉGRATION », arranged in a connected layout. At the edge of the canvas, a small person token labelled « HUMAIN » and a small robot token labelled « AGENT », each with a thin line reaching onto the canvas to show they both author it. A small corner tag reads « VERSIONNÉ, À EMPORTER ». Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond the small schematic tokens. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
